state.next-action: Evolution turn checkpoints 1-15 shipped 2026-04-15. Uniform skill shape LIVE end-to-end across all 75 gad-* skills with full discovery affordances. Shipped: 42.2-07..15 (original turn — uniform shape, install.js + validator + consolidation + snapshot skills section + candidates relocation), 42.2-16 (gad evolution promote splits workflow.md bundle + tests), 42.2-17 (75/75 gad-* skills carry workflow: frontmatter; Category 1 COMMAND.md migration + Category 2 inline-body extraction), 42.2-18 (skill-shape.md §10 standard flow + §11 lifecycle), 42.2-19 (shrink 18 Category 1 SKILL.md duplicates to thin pointer shape), 42.2-20 (gad skill show + list --paths + skill-shape.md §1a workflows/ vs .planning/workflows/ clarification + references/proto-skills.md stale refs fix), 42.2-21 (5-agent subagent discovery test battery — mean confidence 7.3/10, findings + DSL exploration notes at .planning/notes/). Commits: 82e78b8, bfb2711, 0a49837, c571fde, a8584ac, d51e6aa, 2fe5b40, a3a8e32 (+42.2-17 consolidation), f9b9f19, 07bfc83, ce53f94, 85d4282. Still blocked: 42.2-13 on 42.2-06 (create-proto-skill implementation). Validator green, 15/15 tests green. P1 follow-ups captured in findings doc: (a) snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS bias toward high-relevance-only misses authoring skills, (b) chicken-and-egg session start (gad snapshot CLI contract only discoverable via CLAUDE.md), (c) three overlapping authoring skills need CLI disambiguation. Also: workflow DSL retrofit experiment recommended (Position B lightweight Markdown tags). Next steps for operator: rerun the subagent discovery battery after P1 fixes to target mean confidence ≥ 8.5; greenlight or defer the DSL experiment; unblock 42.2-13 via 42.2-06.
